description: Style NoteYour boy will love this top from superman. Team it with shorts or jeans and comfy footwear for that uber cool and comfy look. Product DetailsBlue T-shirt, has a round neckline, dark blue panels and sleeves, embroidered detail on the right sleeve and graphic print in frontMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash cool with like coloursonly bleach when neededTumble dry lowDo not iron or dry clean if decorated
